title: Daylight Control
description: Adds more control over the speed of the daylight cycle with custom a custom game rule including the option for 24 hour long days!
body:
Daylight Control

Gives control of the daylight speed rate in the form of a custom game rule with the option of extending the daylight cycle to 24 hours

Features

  • Mathematically adjusts the Minecraft daylight cycle with a custom game rule to control the speed percentage
  • 24 hour option perfect for servers that are online 24 hours a day, 7 days a week that want realtime reflected in game
  • Compatible with Multiplayer Sleeping to allow for players to skip nights and set time to morning
    Sleeping is otherwise disabled
  • Datapack is reliant on accurate tick speed (tps) of your world/server, a laggy server or world with low tps may experience longer days. Ensure you have a constant 20tps for accurate time adjustment
  • Convert real time to Minecraft time with Time Converter and have your in game time reflect the real world
